prompt_text: Great suggestions! What about video games? I need something to play this weekend.

conversation_history.content: I don't have access to real-time weather information.
I'm in Seattle. Any good restaurants you'd recommend?
Seattle has amazing food! Pike Place Market is iconic.
Thanks! Switching topics - what's a good book to read?
That depends on your interests! What genres do you enjoy?
I like thrillers. Any movie recommendations too?
For thriller movies: Knives Out, Get Out, Parasite, Se7en, Silence of the Lambs.
